title: ranunculus natans var. intramongolicus
intro: Ranunculus natans var. intramongolicus, also known as the floating water crowfoot, is a variety of aquatic plant belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus natans var. intramongolicus include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
